import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
    let n = parts.len()
    mut out = ""
    mut i = n - 1
    while i >= 0
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        if i == n - 1
          out = s
        else
          out = "#{out} #{s}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i - 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
